completion_promises.criterion_text: Chunk store key is uuid5(episode_id, index) — deterministic and stable across redeliveries
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented deterministic key generation using uuid.uuid5(FLEET_MEMORY_NAMESPACE, f'{episode_id}:{chunk.index}') in chunk_writer.py lines 76-77. The same episode_id and chunk index always produces the same UUID, ensuring idempotent redelivery.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Writing the same (episode_id, chunks) twice leaves an identical chunk set (no duplicates)
completion_promises.evidence: Idempotency guaranteed by AC-001's deterministic key contract. Redelivery overwrites the same store keys in place rather than appending. Verified by test_redelivery_overwrites_same_keys_no_duplicates which confirms first and second writes target identical keys.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each stored value carries a 'content' field so embed-on-write fires via the store index config
completion_promises.evidence: Stored value dict includes 'content': chunk.text field (chunk_writer.py line 82) which matches the store's index config requirement (fields=['content']). This triggers automatic embedding on aput without direct embed calls.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each stored chunk records source_ref and is confined to ("fleet_memory", project, "chunk")
completion_promises.evidence: Namespace constructed as ('fleet_memory', chunk.project, 'chunk') on line 64. Stored value includes source_ref, project, episode_id, and chunk_index metadata (lines 79-86). Verified by test_chunk_stored_under_project_chunk_namespace.

completion_promises.criterion_text: validate_namespace is called before any aput; a hyphenated project raises NamespaceValidationError and writes nothing
completion_promises.evidence: validate_namespace(namespace) called on line 69 before any store.aput operation. Raises NamespaceValidationError for hyphenated or invalid project names, preventing any writes. Test test_hyphenated_project_raises_namespace_validation_error confirms no aput calls occur on validation failure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A delimiter/path-shaped episode_id cannot place a chunk outside the project's chunk namespace
completion_promises.evidence: episode_id only used in UUID key derivation (line 76: f'{episode_id}:{chunk.index}'), never in namespace tuple construction. Namespace always built from chunk.project (line 64). Path-shaped episode_ids are safely confined to the key string. Verified by test_path_shaped_episode_id_confined_to_namespace.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests use the in-memory/fake store + make_fake_embed (no live infra)
completion_promises.evidence: All tests use mock_store fixture (AsyncMock) defined in test_chunk_writer.py lines 42-47. No real database, network, or embedding service dependencies. Tests are pure unit tests with zero infrastructure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on both src/fleet_memory/relay/chunk_writer.py and tests/unit/relay/test_chunk_writer.py. Both files pass with 'All checks passed!' and zero errors. Line length issues fixed in commit.
